caption: A man with a distinctive high, light-colored hairstyle wears large black over-ear headphones, glasses, and a white button-down shirt accented with a bow tie and suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, positioned in front of a black professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white wall features a framed logo consisting of a shield with a central symbol, while a banner with the words "UNIQUE FASHIONS" is visible. Two graphic overlays appear on screen: a circular logo on the left containing the word "PODCAST" and a red and white text box on the right that reads "SS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the camera angle and overall scene remain static.
